name: beaver
description: Skills for system design, software architecture, and specs — structure before code.

interface.shortDescription: System design, software architecture, and specs — structure before code.
interface.longDescription: Three skills: designing-systems (idea → decision-grade high-level design with a constraint register and building-block selections), architecting-software (Clean Architecture standard + existing-codebase dependency audit), and crafting-code (process gate, four quality pillars, and a simplicity ladder).
defaultPrompt: Design the system for this project.
